import numpy as np
from sklearn.feature_extraction.text import TfidfVectorizer, CountVectorizer
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegression
from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score

def solve(X_train, y_train, X_val, y_val):
    # Convert text to numeric features using TF-IDF
    vectorizer = TfidfVectorizer()
    X_train_tfidf = vectorizer.fit_transform(X_train)
    X_val_tfidf = vectorizer.transform(X_val)

    # Build and train a logistic regression model
    model = LogisticRegression(max_iter=1000, random_state=42)
    model.fit(X_train_tfidf, y_train)

    # Make predictions on the validation set
    predictions = model.predict(X_val_tfidf)

    return predictions

import numpy as np
from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestClassifier
from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score

def solve(X_train, y_train, X_val, y_val):
    # Base line model - RandomForestClassifier
    model = RandomForestClassifier(n_estimators=100)
    model.fit(X_train, y_train)

    # Make predictions
    predictions = model.predict(X_val)

    return predictions

import numpy as np
from sklearn.feature_extraction.text import TfidfVectorizer, CountVectorizer
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegression
from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score

def solve(X_train, y_train, X_val, y_val):
    # Convert text to numeric features using TF-IDF
    vectorizer = TfidfVectorizer()
    X_train_tfidf = vectorizer.fit_transform(X_train)
    X_val_tfidf = vectorizer.transform(X_val)

    # Build and train a logistic regression model
    model = LogisticRegression(max_iter=1000, random_state=42)
    model.fit(X_train_tfidf, y_train)

    # Make predictions on the validation set
    predictions = model.predict(X_val_tfidf)

    return predictions

import numpy as np
from sklearn.feature_extraction.text import TfidfVectorizer
from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegression

def solve(X_train, y_train, X_val, y_val):
    # Convert text to numeric features using TF-IDF
    vectorizer = TfidfVectorizer()
    X_train_tfidf = vectorizer.fit_transform(X_train)
    X_val_tfidf = vectorizer.transform(X_val)

    # Initialize and train the logistic regression model
    model = LogisticRegression(max_iter=1000, random_state=42)
    model.fit(X_train_tfidf, y_train)

    # Make predictions on the validation set
    predictions = model.predict(X_val_tfidf)

    return predictions

from sklearn.feature_extraction.text import TfidfVectorizer
from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegression

def solve(X_train, y_train, X_val, y_val):
    # Convert text to numeric features using TF-IDF vectorization
    vectorizer = TfidfVectorizer()
    X_train_tfidf = vectorizer.fit_transform(X_train)
    X_val_tfidf = vectorizer.transform(X_val)

    # Initialize and train the Logistic Regression model
    clf = LogisticRegression(max_iter=100, random_state=42)
    clf.fit(X_train_tfidf, y_train)

    # Make predictions on the validation set
    predictions = clf.predict(X_val_tfidf)

    return predictions
